mapper.select: SELECT category_id AS categoryId, name, is_active AS isActive FROM main_category WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY category_id

SELECT recipe_code AS recipeCode, category_id AS categoryId, sub_category_code AS subCategoryCode, name, price, img_url AS imgUrl, is_active AS isActive FROM recipe WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY category_id, sub_category_code, recipe_code
SELECT sub_category_code AS subCategoryCode, main_category_id AS categoryId, name FROM sub_category ORDER BY main_category_id

SELECT m.material_code AS materialCode, m.material_group_id AS materialGroupId, m.material_name AS materialName, m.price AS price FROM material m JOIN category_material_group cmg USING (material_group_id) WHERE cmg.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY m.material_group_id, m.material_code

SELECT material_code AS materialCode, material_group_id AS materialGroupId, material_name AS materialName, price AS price FROM material WHERE material_group_id = #{materialGroupId} ORDER BY material_code

SELECT cmg.material_group_id AS materialGroupId, mg.group_name AS groupName, mg.group_min AS groupMin, mg.group_max AS groupMax FROM category_material_group cmg JOIN material_group mg USING (material_group_id) WHERE cmg.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY cmg.material_group_id
